# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

pub trait zenzop::Write

## all features except _* (268 items)

impl core::cmp::Eq for zenzop::ErrorKind
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for zenzop::ErrorKind
pub fn zenzop::ErrorKind::eq(&self, &zenzop::ErrorKind) -> bool
impl core::convert::From<zenzop::ErrorKind> for zenzop::Error
pub fn zenzop::Error::from(zenzop::ErrorKind) -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenzop::ErrorKind
pub fn zenzop::ErrorKind::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Copy for zenzop::ErrorKind
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for zenzop::ErrorKind
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenzop::ErrorKind
impl core::marker::Send for zenzop::ErrorKind
impl core::marker::Sync for zenzop::ErrorKind
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenzop::ErrorKind
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenzop::ErrorKind
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenzop::ErrorKind
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenzop::ErrorKind
pub enum zenzop::Format
pub zenzop::Format::Deflate
pub zenzop::Format::Gzip
pub zenzop::Format::Zlib
impl core::clone::Clone for zenzop::Format
pub fn zenzop::Format::clone(&self) -> zenzop::Format
impl core::cmp::Eq for zenzop::Format
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for zenzop::Format
pub fn zenzop::Format::eq(&self, &zenzop::Format) -> bool
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenzop::Format
pub fn zenzop::Format::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::hash::Hash for zenzop::Format
pub fn zenzop::Format::hash<__H: core::hash::Hasher>(&self, &mut __H)
impl core::marker::Copy for zenzop::Format
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for zenzop::Format
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenzop::Format
impl core::marker::Send for zenzop::Format
impl core::marker::Sync for zenzop::Format
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenzop::Format
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenzop::Format
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenzop::Format
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenzop::Format
pub struct zenzop::CompressResult<W>
impl<W> zenzop::CompressResult<W>
pub fn zenzop::CompressResult<W>::fully_optimized(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenzop::CompressResult<W>::into_inner(self) -> W
impl<W: core::fmt::Debug> core::fmt::Debug for zenzop::CompressResult<W>
pub fn zenzop::CompressResult<W>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl<W> core::marker::Freeze for zenzop::CompressResult<W> where W: core::marker::Freeze
impl<W> core::marker::Send for zenzop::CompressResult<W> where W: core::marker::Send
impl<W> core::marker::Sync for zenzop::CompressResult<W> where W: core::marker::Sync
impl<W> core::marker::Unpin for zenzop::CompressResult<W> where W: core::marker::Unpin
impl<W> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenzop::CompressResult<W> where W: core::marker::UnsafeUnpin
impl<W> core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenzop::CompressResult<W> where W: core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe
impl<W> core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenzop::CompressResult<W> where W: core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe
pub struct zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop>
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::finish(self) -> core::result::Result<zenzop::CompressResult<W>, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::get_mut(&mut self) -> &mut W
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::get_ref(&self) -> &W
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::with_stop(zenzop::Options, W, S) -> Self
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::with_stop_buffered(zenzop::Options, W, S) -> std::io::buffered::bufwriter::BufWriter<Self>
impl<W: zenzop::Write> zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W>
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W>::new(zenzop::Options, W) -> Self
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W>::new_buffered(zenzop::Options, W) -> std::io::buffered::bufwriter::BufWriter<Self>
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> core::fmt::Debug for zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> core::ops::drop::Drop for zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::drop(&mut self)
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> std::io::Write for zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::flush(&mut self) -> std::io::error::Result<()>
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> std::io::error::Result<usize>
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> zenzop::Write for zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::by_ref(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::flush(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::write_all(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
impl<W, S> core::marker::Freeze for zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S> where S: core::marker::Freeze, W: core::marker::Freeze
impl<W, S> core::marker::Send for zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S> where W: core::marker::Send
impl<W, S> core::marker::Sync for zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S> where W: core::marker::Sync
impl<W, S> core::marker::Unpin for zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S> where S: core::marker::Unpin, W: core::marker::Unpin
impl<W, S> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S> where S: core::marker::UnsafeUnpin, W: core::marker::UnsafeUnpin
impl<W, S> core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S> where S: core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe, W: core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe
impl<W, S> core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S> where S: core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe, W: core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe
pub struct zenzop::Error
impl zenzop::Error
pub fn zenzop::Error::kind(&self) -> zenzop::ErrorKind
impl core::convert::From<enough::reason::StopReason> for zenzop::Error
pub fn zenzop::Error::from(enough::reason::StopReason) -> Self
impl core::convert::From<zenzop::ErrorKind> for zenzop::Error
pub fn zenzop::Error::from(zenzop::ErrorKind) -> Self
impl core::error::Error for zenzop::Error
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenzop::Error
pub fn zenzop::Error::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for zenzop::Error
pub fn zenzop::Error::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenzop::Error
impl core::marker::Send for zenzop::Error
impl core::marker::Sync for zenzop::Error
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenzop::Error
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenzop::Error
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenzop::Error
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenzop::Error
pub struct zenzop::GzipEncoder<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop>
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::finish(self) -> core::result::Result<zenzop::CompressResult<W>, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::get_mut(&mut self) -> &mut W
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::get_ref(&self) -> &W
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::with_stop(zenzop::Options, W, S) -> core::result::Result<Self, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::with_stop_buffered(zenzop::Options, W, S) -> core::result::Result<std::io::buffered::bufwriter::BufWriter<Self>, zenzop::Error>
impl<W: zenzop::Write> zenzop::GzipEncoder<W>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W>::new(zenzop::Options, W) -> core::result::Result<Self, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W>::new_buffered(zenzop::Options, W) -> core::result::Result<std::io::buffered::bufwriter::BufWriter<Self>, zenzop::Error>
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> core::fmt::Debug for zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> core::ops::drop::Drop for zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::drop(&mut self)
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> std::io::Write for zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::flush(&mut self) -> std::io::error::Result<()>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> std::io::error::Result<usize>
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> zenzop::Write for zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::by_ref(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::flush(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::write_all(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
impl<W, S> core::marker::Freeze for zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S> where S: core::marker::Freeze, W: core::marker::Freeze
impl<W, S> core::marker::Send for zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S> where W: core::marker::Send
impl<W, S> core::marker::Sync for zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S> where W: core::marker::Sync
impl<W, S> core::marker::Unpin for zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S> where S: core::marker::Unpin, W: core::marker::Unpin
impl<W, S> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S> where S: core::marker::UnsafeUnpin, W: core::marker::UnsafeUnpin
impl<W, S> core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S> where S: core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe, W: core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe
impl<W, S> core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S> where S: core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe, W: core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct zenzop::Options
pub zenzop::Options::block_type: zenzop::BlockType
pub zenzop::Options::enhanced: bool
pub zenzop::Options::iteration_cap: core::num::nonzero::NonZeroU64
pub zenzop::Options::iteration_count: core::num::nonzero::NonZeroU64
pub zenzop::Options::iterations_without_improvement: core::num::nonzero::NonZeroU64
pub zenzop::Options::maximum_block_splits: u16
impl zenzop::Options
pub fn zenzop::Options::effective_iteration_count(&self) -> u64
pub fn zenzop::Options::effective_iterations_without_improvement(&self) -> u64
pub fn zenzop::Options::with_iteration_cap(self, core::num::nonzero::NonZeroU64) -> Self
impl core::clone::Clone for zenzop::Options
pub fn zenzop::Options::clone(&self) -> zenzop::Options
impl core::cmp::Eq for zenzop::Options
impl core::cmp::Ord for zenzop::Options
pub fn zenzop::Options::cmp(&self, &zenzop::Options) -> core::cmp::Ordering
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for zenzop::Options
pub fn zenzop::Options::eq(&self, &zenzop::Options) -> bool
impl core::cmp::PartialOrd for zenzop::Options
pub fn zenzop::Options::partial_cmp(&self, &zenzop::Options) -> core::option::Option<core::cmp::Ordering>
impl core::default::Default for zenzop::Options
pub fn zenzop::Options::default() -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenzop::Options
pub fn zenzop::Options::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::hash::Hash for zenzop::Options
pub fn zenzop::Options::hash<__H: core::hash::Hasher>(&self, &mut __H)
impl core::marker::Copy for zenzop::Options
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for zenzop::Options
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenzop::Options
impl core::marker::Send for zenzop::Options
impl core::marker::Sync for zenzop::Options
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenzop::Options
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenzop::Options
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenzop::Options
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenzop::Options
pub struct zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop>
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::finish(self) -> core::result::Result<zenzop::CompressResult<W>, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::get_mut(&mut self) -> &mut W
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::get_ref(&self) -> &W
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::with_stop(zenzop::Options, W, S) -> core::result::Result<Self, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::with_stop_buffered(zenzop::Options, W, S) -> core::result::Result<std::io::buffered::bufwriter::BufWriter<Self>, zenzop::Error>
impl<W: zenzop::Write> zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W>
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W>::new(zenzop::Options, W) -> core::result::Result<Self, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W>::new_buffered(zenzop::Options, W) -> core::result::Result<std::io::buffered::bufwriter::BufWriter<Self>, zenzop::Error>

pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result

pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::drop(&mut self)
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> std::io::Write for zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::flush(&mut self) -> std::io::error::Result<()>
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> std::io::error::Result<usize>
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> zenzop::Write for zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::by_ref(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::flush(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::write_all(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
impl<W, S> core::marker::Freeze for zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S> where S: core::marker::Freeze, W: core::marker::Freeze
impl<W, S> core::marker::Send for zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S> where W: core::marker::Send
impl<W, S> core::marker::Sync for zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S> where W: core::marker::Sync
impl<W, S> core::marker::Unpin for zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S> where S: core::marker::Unpin, W: core::marker::Unpin
impl<W, S> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S> where S: core::marker::UnsafeUnpin, W: core::marker::UnsafeUnpin
impl<W, S> core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S> where S: core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe, W: core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe
impl<W, S> core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S> where S: core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe, W: core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe
pub const zenzop::DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS: u64
pub trait zenzop::Write
pub fn zenzop::Write::by_ref(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn zenzop::Write::flush(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::Write::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::Write::write_all(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
impl zenzop::Write for &mut [u8]
pub fn &mut [u8]::by_ref(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn &mut [u8]::flush(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
pub fn &mut [u8]::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, zenzop::Error>
pub fn &mut [u8]::write_all(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
impl zenzop::Write for alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub fn alloc::vec::Vec<u8>::by_ref(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn alloc::vec::Vec<u8>::flush(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
pub fn alloc::vec::Vec<u8>::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, zenzop::Error>
pub fn alloc::vec::Vec<u8>::write_all(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
impl<W: zenzop::Write + ?core::marker::Sized> zenzop::Write for &mut W
pub fn &mut W::by_ref(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn &mut W::flush(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
pub fn &mut W::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, zenzop::Error>
pub fn &mut W::write_all(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> zenzop::Write for zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::by_ref(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::flush(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::DeflateEncoder<W, S>::write_all(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> zenzop::Write for zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::by_ref(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::flush(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::GzipEncoder<W, S>::write_all(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
impl<W: zenzop::Write, S: enough::Stop> zenzop::Write for zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::by_ref(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::flush(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::ZlibEncoder<W, S>::write_all(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
pub fn zenzop::compress<R: std::io::Read, W: zenzop::Write>(zenzop::Options, zenzop::Format, R, W) -> core::result::Result<(), zenzop::Error>
